name: TITAN INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: Titan International, Inc. (TWI) manufactures wheels, tires, and undercarriage systems for agricultural equipment, earthmoving/construction equipment, and consumer products. The company sells to OEM customers and aftermarkets globally. Its subsidiary Titan Specialty (formerly The Carlstar Group, LLC) expands its specialty tire offerings. Products include off-highway tires and wheels used in farming, construction, and mining applications.

products.name: Agricultural Wheels and Tires
products.description: Wheels and tires designed for agricultural equipment used in farming applications.

products.name: Earthmoving/Construction Wheels and Tires
products.description: Wheels and tires for earthmoving and construction equipment applications.

products.name: Consumer Products Wheels and Tires
products.description: Wheels and tires for consumer-oriented equipment and vehicles.

products.name: Undercarriage Systems
products.description: Undercarriage components for off-highway equipment including construction and mining machinery.
